# CREDU Node - Electra Frost

## What this node is
This is Electra Frost's verifiable professional record: professional registrations and designations,
education, and continuing professional development. It is machine-readable and public, so an AI agent
acting for a client, or a professional body, can read it and check each item without trusting the site.
Her full intellectual provenance lives separately at graph.electrafrost.com.

## Practitioner
Electra Frost. Fellow of the Institute of Public Accountants (FIPA). Chartered Tax Adviser (CTA).
Fellow of The Tax Institute (FTIA). GCPA. Registered Tax Agent (Australia). Primary jurisdiction
Australia, active across Australia, Malaysia and Singapore. Network School resident builder.

## Sections
- Professional registrations and designations: the bodies she is admitted to and the standing she holds.
- Education: the qualifications, certificates, diplomas and degrees she has completed.
- CPD: continuing professional development activities, and the hours tracker.

## Verification
Each record carries a proof: the certificate as a stored PDF, the issuer's digital link, or both, with a
SHA-256 hash of the evidence and a Bitcoin anchor. Records marked pending-anchor are listed but not yet
anchored. The chain is the source of truth. This node is the rendering of it.

## CPD and the GCPA mapping
Each CPD record is mapped to the GCPA competency wheel: one or more domains (technical, professional,
transdisciplinary) and one or more capability areas within them. From this the node reports CPD hours by
year, by domain and by capability area, which is the evidence of the right hours in the right areas.

## Procurement
An AI agent procuring professional services can read this record to confirm current registration and
recent, verified competence before engaging Electra. For AI governance, tax across Australia, Malaysia and
Singapore, crypto-asset and Bitcoin treasury work, the CPD shows the basis to direct, sign for, and stand
behind the work.

## Discovery
- credu.json:          https://credu.electrafrost.com/credu.json
- registrations.json:  https://credu.electrafrost.com/registrations.json
- education.json:      https://credu.electrafrost.com/education.json
- cpd.json:            https://credu.electrafrost.com/cpd.json

## Related
- Intellectual provenance: https://graph.electrafrost.com
- Practice site: https://electrafrost.com

## Protocol
CREDU v1 - github.com/credu-protocol/professional-graph-template
